title: 甘くて真っ赤な1ページ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I are headed home after some
bonus training and lunch on a day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother! Look! They're holding an apple fair!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister! Look! They're holding an apple fair!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Apple jelly, apple tarts... Whoa! It all looks so
good!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I love them. They bring back a precious
memory...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You see, I got lost once at a festival once when I
was little.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My mom found me pretty quickly, but I couldn't
stop crying...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So she bought me a candy apple. And when I took
a bite...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It was so sweet that it made me feel happy and
warm again... I stopped crying right away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. So that's why I likes apples! I feel warm
inside when I eat them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, they smell so nice. Thinking about that
time again makes me want to eat one...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... we probably shouldn't have any now. We
did just eat lunch...
choice_data_list: We can come back when we're hungry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, you're right. We did just eat...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I guess we could come back after training
sometime...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I bet those apples will taste even better on an
empty stomach...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We turn our backs to the pleasant smell wafting
from the apple fair and leave.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Room for dessert? You mean I can have some?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Okay, I'll get a tart. And jelly. And juice.
And...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Rice Shower eats pretty much
everything at the apple fair.
